title: Forge & Friends
description: The ultimate modpack for epic multiplayer 👥 or solo 🧑‍💻 adventures, with 150+ mods for creativity ⚙️, exploration 🌳, and smooth gameplay 🌍✨
body:
**Forge & Friends** is an expansive modpack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience, especially when shared with friends. Whether you're building intricate contraptions together or embarking on epic adventures as a team, this pack is perfect for multiplayer fun 👥. But don’t worry—it's just as captivating and rewarding when played solo 🧑‍💻.

Dive into a world where creativity, exploration, and innovation collide 🌟. With over 150 meticulously curated mods, Forge & Friends enhances every aspect of gameplay. Unleash your inner engineer with Create and its add-ons like Create: Sweets & Treats and Create Big Cannons, ideal for constructing incredible machines and contraptions ⚙️. Explore breathtaking new biomes 🌳 with Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Terralith, and tackle revamped structures 🏰 with YUNG's suite of Better mods for dungeons, strongholds, and more.

For the adventurous, Ad Astra opens up the cosmos for space exploration 🚀, while BetterNether and BetterEnd introduce thrilling challenges in reimagined dimensions. Customize your world with Macaw's series of mods, featuring detailed furniture, bridges, roofs, and more to make your builds uniquely yours 🛖.

Farmers and food enthusiasts will find joy in Farmer's Delight and its integrations, adding layers of depth to agriculture and culinary creativity 🍲. Performance mods like Starlight and ImmediatelyFast keep your gameplay running smoothly 💨, whether you're creating with friends or enjoying peaceful solo play.

Immerse yourself with Sound Physics Remastered, Dynamic Lights, and Complementary Shaders for an unparalleled sensory experience ✨. Stay connected and strategize with ease using Simple Voice Chat 🎙️, perfect for that ultimate multiplayer touch.

Whether you're conquering dungeons with friends or embarking on a creative solo journey, Forge & Friends is your ultimate playground of possibilities. Gear up, build, explore, and make epic memories—together or on your own! 🌍🛠️
